[[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] '''Sil Unch''' was a [[Neimoidian/Legends|Neimoidian]] who served as a [[Communications officer/Legends|comm officer]] aboard the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] [[Saak'ak/Legends|''Saak'ak'']] during the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]]. He was later transferred to the [[Lucrehulk-class battleship/Legends|Droid Control Ship]] [[Vuutun Palaa/Legends|''Vuutun Palaa'']], [[Death/Legends|dying]] when it was destroyed during the [[Battle of Naboo/Legends|Battle of Naboo]].

==Biography==
[[File:Saakak_bridge.png|thumb|left|250px|Sil Unch, [[Tey How/Legends|Tey How]], and [[Jull Dremon]] seated on the ''Saak'ak''{{'s}} bridge]]
By the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]],<ref name="Essential Reader's Companion" /> [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] Sil Unch<ref name="Rogues Gallery" /> served as a [[Communications officer/Legends|comm officer]]<ref name="Boonta Eve Podrace Sil Unch">{{YJCCG|set=Boonta Eve Podrace|cardname=Sil Unch|link=boontaevepodrace/dark/large/39silunchneimoidiancomm.html}}</ref> aboard the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]], the [[Lucrehulk-class battleship/Legends|modified]] [[Lucrehulk-class LH-3210 cargo freighter/Legends|''Lucrehulk''-class LH-3210 cargo freighter]] [[Saak'ak/Legends|''Saak'ak'']]. During the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]],<ref name="The Phantom Menace" /> he was assigned by Gunray to the [[Lucrehulk-class battleship/Legends|Droid Control Ship]] [[Vuutun Palaa/Legends|''Vuutun Palaa'']]<ref name="The Phantom Menace" /> when the ''Saak'ak'' left the [[Naboo system/Legends|Naboo system]],<ref name="Rogues Gallery" /> where he was [[Death/Legends|killed]] when it was destroyed by [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] during the [[Battle of Naboo/Legends|Battle of Naboo]].<ref name="The Phantom Menace" />

==Personality and traits==
Specialized in [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droid]] control programming<ref name="Rogues Gallery" /> and interfaces, Sil Unch did not enjoy being commanded by [[Captain]] [[Daultay Dofine/Legends|Daultay Dofine]].<ref name="Theed Palace Limited Sil Unch" /> A [[Neimoidian/Legends|Neimoidian]],<ref name="Rogues Gallery" /> he had mottled [[Color/Legends|gray]] skin and red [[Eye/Legends|eyes]].<ref name="The Phantom Menace" />

==Behind the scenes==
Originally created for the [[1999]] film [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']],<ref name="The Phantom Menace" /> Sil Unch was first identified in the [[2001]] [[Boonta Eve Podrace (YJCCG)|''Boonta Eve Podrace'']] expansion set for the [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] ''[[Young Jedi Collectible Card Game]]''. However, [[Decipher]] claimed he was the Neimoidian sitting in the middle of the ''Vuutun Palaa''{{'s}} bridge, erroneously depicting him using an image of [[Tey How/Legends|Tey How]],<ref name="Boonta Eve Podrace Sil Unch" /> an error repeated in its ''[[Theed Palace Limited]]'' expansion set for the [[Star Wars Customizable Card Game|''Star Wars'' Customizable Card Game]].<ref name="Theed Palace Limited Sil Unch" /> [[Rogues Gallery (department)|''The Devious Neimoidians Revealed'']], an article published in [[Star Wars Insider 147|''Star Wars Insider'' 147]], [[Retroactive continuity|retcon]]ed Unch as the Neimoidian sitting on the left side of the ''Saak'ak'' and ''Vuutun Palaa''{{'s}} bridges,<ref name="Rogues Gallery" /> which was set in stone by [[Leland Chee]].<ref name="Creating & Naming">{{Facebook|username=star-wars-sourcebooks|url=notes/star-wars-sourcebooks/creating-naming-the-devious-neimoidians/676129629103814|name=Star Wars Sourcebooks|date=Jan 19, 2014|archivefile=File:NeimoidiansFacebook.pdf}}</ref>
